title: PR #27: fix remaining test failures (staleness + regressions)
prompt:
PR #27 CI: after the CI runner was switched toward Bun (task 6c5ff), the `bun:`/tsx integration cluster is fixed and failures dropped 36→25. This task handles the REMAINING failures that are NOT CI-runner issues — they are genuine test staleness from this branch's own source changes, plus a few possibly-real regressions. Triage each: if the source change is intended, update the test; if it's a real regression, fix the source. Base branch is the PR #27 branch (coordinate: task 6c5ff owns the workflow/runner fixes; this task must NOT touch .github/workflows or the vitest-under-bun / macOS rolldown / bun:sqlite-relocation work).

Failures to fix (from `bun vitest run`, ubuntu):

1) test/runtime/config/runtime-config.test.ts — 9 failures. Source moved the config dir from `.cline/kanban/config.json` to `.kanban/kanban/config.json` and the default/auto-selected agent expectations changed (test expects `pi`, gets `claude`/`codex`; expects `.cline`, code writes `.kanban`; expects project config file removed, etc.). The `.kanban` relocation is intended (data-consolidation into <repo>/.kanban). Update the test expectations to `.kanban` and the current agent-selection behavior. Verify the auto-select default is actually correct vs a regression.

2) test/runtime/terminal/agent-registry.test.ts — 3 failures. A new `qoder` CLI agent was added to the catalog, so the agent id list is now [claude, codex, pi, droid, kiro, qoder] and isBinaryAvailableOnPath is called 9x not 8x. Update the expected lists/counts to include qoder.

3) test/integration/committed-providers.integration.test.ts — "migrates machine-home provider config…": provider.baseUrl comes back null instead of https://api.openai.test/v1. Investigate whether migration dropped baseUrl (real bug) or the test fixture is stale.

4) test/runtime/unified-proxy/network-bridge.test.ts — 4 failures: bridge.port is 0 (expected >0) and ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:80. The bridge binds an ephemeral port but .port stays 0. Determine if port is read before listen resolves (real bug) or an env assumption; fix accordingly.

5) test/integration/task-worktree.integration.test.ts — 2 failures: "restores a trashed task patch onto the saved commit" (patch file not written) and "resumes a trashed task even when the saved patch is invalid" (restored.warning undefined). Investigate whether trashed-task-patch behavior regressed on this branch.

6) test/runtime/trpc/runtime-api.test.ts — "returns cline provider catalog and provider models": catalog no longer contains the expected provider id. Likely per-agent catalog keying staleness; update or fix.

7) test/runtime/terminal/agent-session-adapters.test.ts — "writes Claude settings with explicit permission hook": expects <home>/.kanban/hooks/claude/settings.json but file is absent (ENOENT). Determine where settings are now written and update/fix.

8) test/integration/runtime-state-stream.integration.test.ts — 2 failures: "preserves existing task worktree when base ref advances" (baseCommit mismatch) and "moves stale completed review cards to trash on shutdown" (review card not moved). Investigate for real behavior change vs test assumption.

9) test/integration/task-command-exit.integration.test.ts — 2 failures: "opens only for launch invocations" (didExit false) and "treats create-time reasoning inherit as no explicit override" (exitCode 2). Investigate.

10) test/workspace/workspace-fs-api.test.ts — intermittent unhandled EPIPE: `child.stdin?.write(...)` after the child closed stdin (src/workspace/workspace-fs-api.ts:429 runCheckIgnore). Guard the write against EPIPE / a closed stream so it can't throw an unhandled error (robustness fix).

For each: prefer the smallest correct change. Run `bun vitest run` for the affected files locally in the worktree, then push and confirm with `gh pr checks 27` that these specific failures are gone. Do NOT re-open the workflow/runner work owned by 6c5ff.
